text: A focused review of access control, design, injection, authentication, logging, and AWS deployment hardening.
textPreview: A focused review of access control, design, injection, authentication, logging, and AWS deployment hardening.

text: Before fixes, weak trust boundaries allowed privilege escalation, data exposure, and database manipulation.
textPreview: Before fixes, weak trust boundaries allowed privilege escalation, data exposure, and database manipulation.

text: After fixes, the app moves critical checks server-side and reduces exploitability with parameterised SQL, Cognito, secrets management, and audit logging.
textPreview: After fixes, the app moves critical checks server-side and reduces exploitability with parameterised SQL, Cognito, secrets management, an...

text: Demo focuses on blocked privilege escalation, protected admin routes, safer payload handling, and production deployment evidence.
textPreview: Demo focuses on blocked privilege escalation, protected admin routes, safer payload handling, and production deployment evidence.

text:
Bruno/Postman requests
Browser + DevTools
Terminal/database evidence
textPreview: Bruno/Postman requests | Browser + DevTools | Terminal/database evidence

text:
Description
Exploit path
Impact

textPreview: Description | Exploit path | Impact | Fix + re-test

text: Users can act outside their intended permissions.
textPreview: Users can act outside their intended permissions.

text: Client CSS hides admin UI only
textPreview: Client CSS hides admin UI only

text: JWT secret and API exposure widen blast radius
textPreview: JWT secret and API exposure widen blast radius

text: For SP Games, this means a regular or unauthenticated user could perform admin-level actions.
textPreview: For SP Games, this means a regular or unauthenticated user could perform admin-level actions.

text: SQL injection supports access-control bypass evidence
textPreview: SQL injection supports access-control bypass evidence

text: Bruno: create admin, delete game, fetch users with passwords.
textPreview: Bruno: create admin, delete game, fetch users with passwords.

text: Protected routes return 401/403 and the server refuses to start without a secret.
textPreview: Protected routes return 401/403 and the server refuses to start without a secret.

text: The product design places trust in the wrong boundary.
textPreview: The product design places trust in the wrong boundary.

text: Direct API calls bypass UI controls
textPreview: Direct API calls bypass UI controls

text: The issue is not only a bug; the design allowed the browser to make authority decisions.
textPreview: The issue is not only a bug; the design allowed the browser to make authority decisions.

text: Direct API calls skip hidden controls
textPreview: Direct API calls skip hidden controls

text: Untrusted input becomes executable SQL or browser code.
textPreview: Untrusted input becomes executable SQL or browser code.

text: Payloads reach DB and victim browsers
textPreview: Payloads reach DB and victim browsers

text: Injection turns normal form fields into a path for data theft, tampering, and browser-side compromise.
textPreview: Injection turns normal form fields into a path for data theft, tampering, and browser-side compromise.

text: Same payloads are blocked, parameterized, or rendered harmless.
textPreview: Same payloads are blocked, parameterized, or rendered harmless.

text: Login, session, and credential handling are too weak.
textPreview: Login, session, and credential handling are too weak.

text: Hardcoded signing key overlap with A01
textPreview: Hardcoded signing key overlap with A01

text: A successful XSS or database leak can become account takeover rather than only a display issue.
textPreview: A successful XSS or database leak can become account takeover rather than only a display issue.

text: Session hijacking through client token storage
textPreview: Session hijacking through client token storage

text: Hardcoded signing key also covered under A01
textPreview: Hardcoded signing key also covered under A01

text: Security events are not captured well enough to detect or investigate attacks.
textPreview: Security events are not captured well enough to detect or investigate attacks.

text: No audit trail for sensitive actions
textPreview: No audit trail for sensitive actions

text: Without durable security logs, attacks can succeed quietly and incident response has little evidence.
textPreview: Without durable security logs, attacks can succeed quietly and incident response has little evidence.

text:
Hosted UI + PKCE
Admin group → role
textPreview: Hosted UI + PKCE | Admin group → role

fail-fast config

text: Open the vulnerable code or request and explain what trust boundary is broken.
textPreview: Open the vulnerable code or request and explain what trust boundary is broken.

text: Act as a malicious user using Bruno, browser DevTools, terminal output, or database evidence.
textPreview: Act as a malicious user using Bruno, browser DevTools, terminal output, or database evidence.

text: Switch to the fixed version and show the same action is rejected, harmless, or logged safely.
textPreview: Switch to the fixed version and show the same action is rejected, harmless, or logged safely.

text: Use one fast example per OWASP category. The story is: this was exploitable, this is how, this is how we fixed it.
textPreview: Use one fast example per OWASP category. The story is: this was exploitable, this is how, this is how we fixed it.

text: Find route files with missing verifyToken / requireAdmin, then show CSS-only admin hiding in the frontend.
textPreview: Find route files with missing verifyToken / requireAdmin, then show CSS-only admin hiding in the frontend.

text: In Bruno, call an admin endpoint without login: create an Admin user, delete a game, or fetch /users.
textPreview: In Bruno, call an admin endpoint without login: create an Admin user, delete a game, or fetch /users.

text: Add auth middleware and RBAC. Re-run the same request and show 401/403; /users no longer returns passwords.
textPreview: Add auth middleware and RBAC. Re-run the same request and show 401/403; /users no longer returns passwords.

text: Presenter cue: keep each exploit under one minute; show screenshots if the live environment is unstable.
textPreview: Presenter cue: keep each exploit under one minute; show screenshots if the live environment is unstable.

text: Open registration request/body where client can send type: Admin and frontend decides admin visibility.
textPreview: Open registration request/body where client can send type: Admin and frontend decides admin visibility.

text: Send POST /users with type=Admin or reveal hidden admin panel through DevTools/CSS tampering.
textPreview: Send POST /users with type=Admin or reveal hidden admin panel through DevTools/CSS tampering.

text: Server ignores client role and assigns default user role. requireAdmin protects admin actions even if UI is modified.
textPreview: Server ignores client role and assigns default user role. requireAdmin protects admin actions even if UI is modified.

text: Presenter cue: keep each exploit under one minute; show screenshots if the live environment is unstable.
textPreview: Presenter cue: keep each exploit under one minute; show screenshots if the live environment is unstable.

text: Open raw SQL string concatenation or innerHTML rendering for reviews/game text.
textPreview: Open raw SQL string concatenation or innerHTML rendering for reviews/game text.

text: Use Bruno payload ' OR 1=1 -- for SQLi, then show stored XSS with <script>alert(1)</script> or a safe screenshot.
textPreview: Use Bruno payload ' OR 1=1 -- for SQLi, then show stored XSS with <script>alert(1)</script> or a safe screenshot.

text: Use ? placeholders, validation, and safe rendering. Same payload becomes rejected or displayed as harmless text.
textPreview: Use ? placeholders, validation, and safe rendering. Same payload becomes rejected or displayed as harmless text.

text: Presenter cue: keep each exploit under one minute; show screenshots if the live environment is unstable.
textPreview: Presenter cue: keep each exploit under one minute; show screenshots if the live environment is unstable.

text: Show plaintext password record, localStorage token, Remember Me password, or hardcoded JWT secret.
textPreview: Show plaintext password record, localStorage token, Remember Me password, or hardcoded JWT secret.

text: Explain attacker path: DB leak exposes passwords; XSS reads localStorage token; forged JWT uses known secret.
textPreview: Explain attacker path: DB leak exposes passwords; XSS reads localStorage token; forged JWT uses known secret.

text: Use bcrypt, Cognito Hosted UI + PKCE, JWKS verification, env secrets, and recommend httpOnly secure cookies.
textPreview: Use bcrypt, Cognito Hosted UI + PKCE, JWKS verification, env secrets, and recommend httpOnly secure cookies.

text: Presenter cue: keep each exploit under one minute; show screenshots if the live environment is unstable.
textPreview: Presenter cue: keep each exploit under one minute; show screenshots if the live environment is unstable.

text: Show console.log(err), specific username/email errors, and missing audit events in raw version.
textPreview: Show console.log(err), specific username/email errors, and missing audit events in raw version.

text: Trigger failed registration/login/review actions and show enumeration or unsafe logs.
textPreview: Trigger failed registration/login/review actions and show enumeration or unsafe logs.

text: Use audit(), safeError(), generic 422 messages, review ownership checks, and CloudWatch/centralised retention for production.
textPreview: Use audit(), safeError(), generic 422 messages, review ownership checks, and CloudWatch/centralised retention for production.

text: Presenter cue: keep each exploit under one minute; show screenshots if the live environment is unstable.
textPreview: Presenter cue: keep each exploit under one minute; show screenshots if the live environment is unstable.

text: Next hardening: HTTPS/HSTS everywhere, secure httpOnly cookies, complete bcrypt migration, CloudWatch retention and alerts.
textPreview: Next hardening: HTTPS/HSTS everywhere, secure httpOnly cookies, complete bcrypt migration, CloudWatch retention and alerts.

text: Frontend hiding is not access control; every sensitive action needs backend enforcement.
textPreview: Frontend hiding is not access control; every sensitive action needs backend enforcement.

text: Parameterized SQL, output encoding, and input validation must be defaults, not last-minute patches.
textPreview: Parameterized SQL, output encoding, and input validation must be defaults, not last-minute patches.

text: Passwords, tokens, JWT secrets, and roles need a coherent architecture, not isolated fixes.
textPreview: Passwords, tokens, JWT secrets, and roles need a coherent architecture, not isolated fixes.

text: If attacks are not logged safely and durably, the team cannot investigate or prove impact.
textPreview: If attacks are not logged safely and durably, the team cannot investigate or prove impact.

text: As a team, the biggest takeaway is that security is not one feature. It is the way data, identity, code, deployment, and monitoring connect.
textPreview: As a team, the biggest takeaway is that security is not one feature. It is the way data, identity, code, deployment, and monitoring connect.

text: Login with Cognito Hosted UI and browse as a normal user.
textPreview: Login with Cognito Hosted UI and browse as a normal user.

text: Attempt role escalation with POST /users type=Admin → rejected.
textPreview: Attempt role escalation with POST /users type=Admin → rejected.

text: Call protected admin route without a token → 401/403.
textPreview: Call protected admin route without a token → 401/403.

text: Re-run representative SQLi/XSS payloads → blocked or harmless.
textPreview: Re-run representative SQLi/XSS payloads → blocked or harmless.

text: Trigger audit events and show structured security logs.
textPreview: Trigger audit events and show structured security logs.

text: Flash AWS evidence: Secrets Manager, EC2, S3/Amplify, Cognito.
textPreview: Flash AWS evidence: Secrets Manager, EC2, S3/Amplify, Cognito.
